title: Repelium
description: A simple modpack that will repel your game experience!
body:
This is generated by ferium to packwiz  https://github.com/gorilla-devs/ferium/discussions/167, which might not work.
This is a fully client side modpack that boots your framerate and your playing experience!
The following changelog is `ferium list -v --markdown`


**['Slight' Gui Modifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/O7JVMrQX)**  
_Allows 'slight' gui modifications_

|             |               |
|-------------|---------------|
| Source      | Modrinth `O7JVMrQX` |
| Open Source | [Yes](https://github.com/shedaniel/slight-gui-modifications)            |
| Author      | [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/1Hsaf75m)            |
| Categories  | decoration, utility            |
